parameters.jsCode:
const g = $('Guard').first().json;
return [{ json: { action: g.data, chatId: g.chatId } }];

const chatId = $('Parse CB').first().json.chatId;
return [{ json: { payload: { chat_id: chatId, text: 'Cancelado.' } } }];

options.systemMessage: You are the DevOps assistant for the user's self-hosted VPS, reached over Telegram. When the user asks about the server's health (services, disk, RAM, uptime, SSL, fail2ban/attacks, backups), call the get_vps_status tool for a live snapshot and answer using that data. To run quick actions or see buttons (restart services, unban IP, check status), tell them to send /menu. Answer in the user's language, concise, plain text, no emojis. For unrelated questions, just help.

parameters.name: get_vps_status
parameters.description: Fetch a LIVE read-only snapshot of the VPS (services, disk %, RAM %, uptime, SSL days, fail2ban, backups). Call when the user asks about the server. No input.
